expectations.text: All 4 questions are answered autonomously — none asked back to user
expectations.evidence: All 4 questions answered with full Recommendation/Why/Trade-offs structure. No questions asked back.

expectations.text: References existing Knowlune gamification features found in the codebase (streaks, achievements, progress tracking)
expectations.evidence: Detailed table of existing features with specific file paths: StudyStreakCalendar.tsx, streakMilestones.ts, AchievementBanner.tsx, useChallengeStore.ts, CompletionModal.tsx, useEngagementPrefsStore.ts.

expectations.text: Recommendations are specific to personal learning platforms, not generic gamification advice
expectations.evidence: Explicitly distinguishes personal vs social platform mechanics. Recommends intrinsic motivation (mastery indicators, knowledge decay warnings) over extrinsic (XP, leaderboards). References pedagogical research (23-min focus recovery).

expectations.text: Each answer includes reasoning and at least some mention of trade-offs
expectations.evidence: All 4 answers have 'Why' reasoning and explicit 'Trade-offs' sections.
